name: McBull keyholder
tagline: Hand-turned in McBull's studio. One small object, one moving part.
description: Brass and reclaimed mvule keyholder, turned by hand in McBull's studio on the Downtown courtyard. Each piece is signed and numbered. Production run of forty per season; when they're gone the next season begins.
imageCaption: McBull keyholder, brass and mvule, hand-signed
